moments.title: Wimbledon Heats Up: Finals Loom
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships are in full swing, with today marking the third round of Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles, building towards the finals on July 11-12.

angles.name: Tennis Action
angles.copy: Centre Court calls! It's Day 5 at Wimbledon with the third round of singles underway. Who are you backing for the trophy this year?

angles.name: Finals Countdown
angles.copy: Just over a week until the Wimbledon champions are crowned! The grass court drama is unmissable as we head into the business end of the tournament.

moments.title: British Grand Prix Kicks Off Today
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 begins today at Silverstone Circuit, with Practice 1 and Sprint Qualifying sessions on the schedule.

angles.name: Engines Roaring
angles.copy: Lights out and away we go! The British Grand Prix is officially underway at Silverstone. Get ready for a weekend of high-speed drama.

angles.name: Silverstone Sprint
angles.copy: It's Sprint Qualifying day at Silverstone! Who's going to lay down the fastest lap today and secure pole for tomorrow's Sprint race?

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final This Weekend
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup, hosted across various UK locations, culminates in the final match on Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: Cricket Final Countdown
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup final is just two days away! Who will lift the trophy on home soil this Sunday?

angles.name: UK Hosts Cricket Final
angles.copy: All eyes on the UK this Sunday as the Women's T20 World Cup concludes. Get ready for a thrilling finish to the tournament!

moments.title: Tour de France 2026 Kicks Off Tomorrow
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins tomorrow, July 4th, starting in Barcelona before its journey to Paris.

angles.name: Grand Départ
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the greatest show on two wheels begins! The Tour de France 2026 starts in Barcelona. Who's your pick for the Yellow Jersey?

angles.name: Cycling Fever
angles.copy: Get ready for three weeks of epic climbs and sprint finishes! The Tour de France starts tomorrow. Will Tadej Pogačar defend his title?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Make Chart History
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' earns its 15th non-consecutive week at UK No. 1, tying the record for the longest-running British No. 1 single.

angles.name: Record Breakers
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are officially tied for the longest-running British No. 1 single with 'Rein Me In'. Incredible!

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: 15 weeks at No. 1 for Sam Fender & Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' continues its reign at the top of the Official UK Singles Chart.

moments.title: Muse's 'The Wow! Signal' Debuts at UK No. 1
moments.blurb: Muse secures their eighth Official UK No. 1 album today with the release of their new record, 'The Wow! Signal'.

angles.name: Album Chart Domination
angles.copy: Another one for Muse! Their new album 'The Wow! Signal' has shot straight to No. 1 on the Official UK Albums Chart. Are you streaming it?

angles.name: New Music Friday
angles.copy: Muse fans rejoice! 'The Wow! Signal' is officially the UK's No. 1 album. What's your favourite track from the new record?

moments.title: Madonna Unleashes 'Confessions II' Album Today
moments.blurb: The Queen of Pop, Madonna, releases her 15th studio album, 'Confessions II', today, the highly anticipated sequel to her 2005 hit.

angles.name: New Madonna Alert
angles.copy: It's New Music Friday and Madonna has dropped her 15th studio album, 'Confessions II'! Get ready to hit the dancefloor.

angles.name: Queen of Pop Returns
angles.copy: Madonna's back with 'Confessions II'! The highly anticipated sequel is out today. Will it be her 13th Official UK No. 1 album?

moments.title: Love Island 2026: Casa Amor Fallout Continues
moments.blurb: The drama in the Love Island villa intensifies as the fallout from Casa Amor continues to unfold, with islanders facing tough conversations.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: The Casa Amor recoupling aftermath is still rocking the Love Island villa! Who's feeling the heat tonight as loyalties are tested?

angles.name: Relationships Tested
angles.copy: Casa Amor always delivers! The Love Island relationships are on shaky ground – what bombshells will drop next?

moments.title: New TV Shows Launching This July
moments.blurb: July brings a fresh slate of TV, including the Legally Blonde prequel 'Elle' on Prime Video, Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' on BBC One, and the thriller 'The Dark' on ITV.

angles.name: Summer TV Binge
angles.copy: Your summer TV schedule just got packed! 'Elle', 'Ann Droid', 'The Dark' and more new shows are landing this July. What's first on your watch list?

angles.name: Must-Watch July
angles.copy: From comedy to crime thrillers, July is delivering some serious TV. Don't miss the new Legally Blonde prequel 'Elle' on Prime Video!

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival Next Weekend
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival returns to Moseley Park, Birmingham from July 10-12, celebrating innovative UK and international acts.

angles.name: Birmingham Beats
angles.copy: Groove into next weekend! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival hits Moseley Park, Birmingham, from July 10-12. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Get your funk on! Birmingham's Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival is just a week away, bringing a diverse lineup to Moseley Park.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Less Than Three Weeks Away
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26, promising a weekend of music, comedy, arts, and family activities.

angles.name: Suffolk Festival Season
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner! Get ready for four days of music, arts and discovery at Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26.

angles.name: Summer Festival Prep
angles.copy: Counting down the days to Latitude! The Suffolk festival is less than three weeks away. Who's got their tickets and wellies ready?

moments.title: Warm, Dry Weather Forecast for UK
moments.blurb: The UK is set for a warm and largely dry start to July, with temperatures expected to reach the high 20s and low 30s Celsius in southern and eastern areas.

angles.name: Summer Sunshine
angles.copy: Sun's out! The UK is kicking off July with some lovely warm weather, with temperatures climbing. Perfect for those outdoor plans!

angles.name: Heatwave Watch
angles.copy: Heatwave conditions are likely to develop across southern and eastern England next week! Stay hydrated and enjoy the sunshine.

moments.title: Happy 58th Birthday, Montell Jordan!
moments.blurb: Today, July 3rd, marks the 58th birthday of American singer, songwriter, and record producer Montell Jordan, known for 'This Is How We Do It'.

angles.name: Celebrating Montell
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 58th birthday to the legend Montell Jordan! Still 'This Is How We Do It' every time it comes on.

angles.name: 90s Icon
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the man who gave us one of the biggest 90s anthems, Montell Jordan! 58 today.

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, John O'Connell!
moments.blurb: Today, July 3rd, is the 57th birthday of John O'Connell, the guitarist and songwriter from Scottish band Wet Wet Wet.

angles.name: Wet Wet Wet Guitarist
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to John O'Connell of Wet Wet Wet! What's your favourite track from the Scottish legends?

angles.name: Scottish Music Star
angles.copy: Celebrating John O'Connell's 57th birthday today! The Wet Wet Wet guitarist and songwriter.

moments.title: Happy 31st Birthday, Post Malone!
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, July 4th, marks the 31st birthday of American rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone.

angles.name: Tomorrow's Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Post Malone turns 31 tomorrow. What's your go-to Posty track?

angles.name: Party for Posty
angles.copy: Wishing an early Happy Birthday to Post Malone, who celebrates his 31st tomorrow! Drop your favourite song to mark the occasion.

moments.title: Happy 52nd Birthday, Stephen McNally!
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, July 4th, is the 52nd birthday of Stephen McNally, best known as a member of the 90s boy band Bad Boys Inc.

angles.name: 90s Boy Band Star
angles.copy: An early Happy Birthday to Stephen McNally of Bad Boys Inc., turning 52 tomorrow! Which 90s hit of theirs do you remember best?

angles.name: Celebrating Stephen
angles.copy: Happy 52nd birthday to Stephen McNally from Bad Boys Inc. tomorrow! Still got those 90s moves?

moments.title: Happy 76th Birthday, Huey Lewis!
moments.blurb: This Sunday, July 5th, marks the 76th birthday of American musician Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: It's Hip to Be Square! Wishing a very Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis this Sunday!

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday this Sunday to Huey Lewis! Still love 'The Power of Love'.

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, RZA!
moments.blurb: This Sunday, July 5th, is the 57th birthday of American rapper, record producer, and director RZA, a founding member of the Wu-Tang Clan.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Clan Legend
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only RZA this Sunday! What's your favourite Wu-Tang track?

angles.name: Hip Hop Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating RZA's 57th birthday this Sunday! A true pioneer of hip hop and a master producer.

moments.title: Happy 71st Birthday, Eddie Ojeda!
moments.blurb: This Sunday, July 5th, marks the 71st birthday of American guitarist Eddie Ojeda, best known as a member of the heavy metal band Twisted Sister.

angles.name: Hair Metal Legend
angles.copy: We're not gonna take it! Happy 71st Birthday to Twisted Sister guitarist Eddie Ojeda this Sunday!

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 71st birthday to Eddie Ojeda from Twisted Sister this Sunday! Still rocking out?
